commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `--reply-all` to Gmail draft create/update, derives draft recipients from reply targets, updates command/spec docs, adds draft reply tests, and hardens one help-printer environment test.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main prepares draft reply metadata but builds draft To/Cc/Bcc only from explicit fields while allowing missing `To`, matching the linked issue's report.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A collaborator explicitly paused ClawSweeper automation with `@clawsweeper stop`, so the next action is human review rather than further repair automation.

target.title: fix(gmail): add reply-all recipients for draft replies
target.body:
## Summary

- Add `--reply-all` to `gog gmail drafts create` and `gog gmail drafts update`.
- Infer To/Cc recipients from the reply target when `--reply-all` is set, reusing the existing reply recipient logic.
- Preserve current no-recipient draft behavior unless users explicitly opt into `--reply-all`.
- Update generated command docs and changelog release-note context.

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/gogcli/issues/804

## Testing

- `make docs-commands`
- `go test -vet=off ./internal/cmd -run 'Test(GmailDrafts(Create|Update)Cmd|BuildReplyRecipients|ReplyInfo|FetchReplyInfo)'`
- `make ci`

## Notes

Reported by @privatenumber in #804.

ClawSweeper 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: issue-openclaw-gogcli-804
- Source PRs: none
- Credit: Issue reported by @privatenumber in https://github.com/openclaw/gogcli/issues/804.; No contributor implementation PR exists for #804; preserve reporter credit in the PR body and changelog entry.
- Validation: make docs-commands; go test -vet=off ./internal/cmd -run 'Test(GmailDrafts(Create|Update)Cmd|BuildReplyRecipients|ReplyInfo|FetchReplyInfo)'; make ci
- Replacement reason: ClawSweeper could not update the source PR branch directly, so it opened a writable replacement PR instead.
